title: CookeyMod
description: A mod tweaking various smaller settings similar to what can be found in "PvP-clients"
body: # CookeyMod A mod tweaking various smaller things such as adding/changing animations similar to PvP clients. This mod originated as a PvP client sort-of alternative for the Combat Tests versions of the game, but has been ported to default versions too. # Current Features ## Animations & Rendering - Tool blocking: Enables a blocking animation for all tools when blocking with a shield in the other hand, similar to 1.8 sword blocking. - Swing & use item: Prevents eating/drinking animations from cancelling the swinging animation. - Camera transition speed: Changes the speed at which the camera height transitions (for example, when sneaking). Can also disable the animation entirely. - 3rd person eating & drinking animation: Enables a third-person eating/drinking animation in third person similar to the old console versions. - Disable camera shake: Disables the camera shake when bobbing is enabled, but not the hand movement itself. ## HUD & Rendering - Ignore effect FOV: Prevents potion effects from changing your field of view. Sprinting will still slightly increase the FOV. - Show hand when invisible: Shows a transparent hand when the player has the invisibility effect in first person instead of hiding the hand entirely. - Damage tint options: - Damage color on entities: Changes the color of the damage tint for entities. - Show on armor: Enables the damage tint to show on armor (and optionally on armor trims) as well (similar to how it did in 1.7). - Show on held items (3rd person): Enables the damage tint for held items in third person. - Show on cape: Enables the damage tint on worn capes. - Show in first person: Enables the damage tint on hands (or additionally on items) in first person. - Cooldown hand offset: Allows you to change the height your hand will be at when the cooldown has just reset. - Alternative bobbing: Enables an alternative bobbing animation (sort-of similar to bedrock). - Hide unused shield: Hides your shield in first person when it's not used. - Show hand when invisible: Makes your hand appear in 1st person even if you currently have the invisibility effect. - Hand opacity when invisible: Changes how transparent your hand is when you are invisible and "Show hand when invisible" is on. ## Miscellaneous - Fix cooldown desync: Fixes the attack cooldown indicator being out of sync with its actual state on the server in certain cases. (see [MC-218570](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-218570)) - Name in 3rd person: Shows your own name in third person. - Mod button in MC options: Changes whether the CookeyMod options button is shown in the general settings.
